'''vashuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroglycemia|fibroglycemia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroglycemia|fibroglycemia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vashuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || væshikith || væshikij || væshikish || væshiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || vashushukuth || vashushukuj || vashushukush || vashushuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || vashukuth || vashukuj || vashukush || vashuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || vashufkufth || vashufkufj || vashufkufsh || vashufkuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vashukuthu || vashukuju || vashukushu || vashukuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || vashukuth || vashukuj || vashukush || vashuku
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vashukuthul || vashukujul || vashukushul || vashukukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vashukuuthuthu || vashukuujuju || vashukuushushu || vashukuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || vashukuthun || vashukujun || vashukushun || vashukukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vashukuthuoro || vashukujuoro || vashukushuoro || vashukukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
